<{%reset%}>    [id=1]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}>    [urn=urn:pulumi:test-stack::test-project::pkgA:index:Component::comp]

<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:pulumi:test-stack::test-project::pulumi:providers:pkgB::childProv]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}>    <{%reset%}>  pulumi:providers:pkgB: (same)
<{%reset%}>        [id=3]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}>        [urn=urn:pulumi:test-stack::test-project::pkgA:index:Component$pulumi:providers:pkgB::childProv]

<{%reset%}>        [id=1]

    <{%fg 2%}>+ 1 created<{%reset%}>
